summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Product Configuration Module (Configuración de Productos). All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products - List all products (29 products)
Backend: GET /api/products/{id} - Get single product by ID
Backend: POST /api/products - Create product with all new fields (printed_name, report_category_id, price_a-e, button colors, modifier_assignments)
Backend: PUT /api/products/{id} - Update product with new fields
Backend: GET /api/report-categories - List report categories (5 categories: Alimentos, Bebidas, Postres, Licores, Otros)
Backend: POST /api/report-categories - Create report category
Backend: GET /api/modifiers - List modifier groups (4 groups: Punto de Coccion, Extras, Acompanantes, Sin...)
Backend: GET /api/modifiers/{id} - Get single modifier by ID
Backend: POST /api/modifiers - Create modifier group with options
Backend: PUT /api/modifiers/{id} - Update modifier group
Backend: GET /api/categories - List menu categories
Frontend: Login with Admin PIN 0000
Frontend: Navigate to Settings page
Frontend: Productos tab shows product list with categories and edit buttons
Frontend: Navigate to /product/new for new product
Frontend: 4 tabs present (General, Precios, Receta, Modificadores)
Frontend: General Tab - Product name input
Frontend: General Tab - Printed name input (Descripción Impresa)
Frontend: General Tab - Category select (Categoría del Menú)
Frontend: General Tab - Report category select (Categoría de Reporte)
Frontend: General Tab - Track inventory switch (Controlar Inventario)
Frontend: General Tab - Color pickers for button styling (BG and Text)
Frontend: General Tab - Button preview with selected colors
Frontend: Precios Tab - 5 price inputs (A-E) with RD$ prefix
Frontend: Receta Tab - Link to Inventory module
Frontend: Modificadores Tab - Add modifier button
Frontend: Modificadores Tab - Modifier assignment dialog with min/max selections and allow multiple switch
Frontend: Create new product - Success toast 'Producto creado exitosamente'
Frontend: Edit existing product - Data loads correctly (name, category, price)
Frontend: Update product - Success toast 'Producto actualizado exitosamente'
seed_data_creation: Test products created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Configuration Module fully tested. All 4 tabs (General, Precios, Receta, Modificadores) working. New fields (printed_name, report_category_id, price_a-e, button_bg_color, button_text_color, modifier_assignments) are properly saved and loaded. Backend APIs for products, modifiers, and report-categories all functional.
